note: Canonical page inventory for the IPAFFS IUU journey (filed as a CHED-P Fish / catch-certificate notification). Deduplicated from 1 core-journey trace (hash db2d277c…, 'B2C Importer (Not Agent): Submits Valid CHEDP Fish Notification', 0 errors, 175 actions) and reconciled against the QA-automation ground truth workflow createChedPFishNotificationUpToReview() in workflows/notification/ched-p-workflows.ts plus the page-objects/notification/*.ts page set. Where the trace collapsed multiple pages into one pageGuess, the workflow + page objects let us split them (e.g. commodity search vs species; latest-health-certificate vs accompanying-documents; contact-details + nominated-contacts hidden inside the trace's 'Intermediate save-and-continue steps'). Only the dashboard, review, declaration and contact-details URLs are captured/known concretely; inner-page urlPatterns are inferred from the IPAFFS notification create path /notification/vnet/protected/notifications/{chedReference}/<segment> and marked inferred.

pages.name: Notifications dashboard
pages.conditional: always — entry point; lists existing notifications and exposes the 'Create a new notification' link that starts the journey

evidence.note: navigate to dashboard URL (only concrete URL in the trace)

pages.name: Import type / notification type (CHED type selection)
pages.conditional: always — selects 'Products of animal origin' (fishery products route filed as CHED-P)

pages.name: Country of origin
pages.conditional: always

pages.name: Origin of import (conformance + change of destination after BCP)
pages.conditional: always — two radios: 'Does this consignment conform' and 'Will the consignment change after BCP'; answering change-of-destination 'Yes' drives the after-BCP transport leg later

evidence.note: check 'Will the consignment change' → Yes (mid of range)

pages.name: Search commodity (enter commodity code)
pages.conditional: always — trace collapsed this with the species page; split per SearchCommodityPage vs CommodityBasicDescriptionPage. Fish CN code 03019230 (Anguilla spp.)

pages.name: Commodity basic description (type of commodity + species selection)
pages.conditional: always — type of commodity dropdown (farmed stock), species checkbox (Anguilla spp.), and a yes/no radio

evidence.note: check species checkbox 'Anguilla spp.' (mid of range)

pages.name: About the consignment (purpose of import)
pages.conditional: always — purpose radio (Re-entry selected here)

pages.name: Select risk category (risk level)
pages.conditional: always — risk radio; 'Medium risk' selected. Risk level gates the later Latest Health Certificate requirement

pages.name: Health certificate required (interstitial to task list)
pages.conditional: always — informational interstitial with a Continue link leading to the task-list hub

pages.name: Notification hub (task list)
pages.conditional: task-list spine — the hub returned to between task groups; trace shows the 'Commodity' task link click that opens the commodity-details page

pages.name: Commodity extended description (weights, packages)
pages.conditional: always — net weight, number of packages, package type, total gross weight

pages.name: Commodity additional details (storage temperature)
pages.conditional: always — storage-temperature radio ('Ambient')

pages.name: Catch certificate needed?
pages.conditional: fishery products (CHED-P fish / IUU) only — the catch-certificate spine that the new standalone IUU service is built around

pages.name: Attach catch certificate (file upload)
pages.conditional: fishery products (IUU) only — repeated once per catch certificate (trace uploads 2)

pages.name: Manage catch certificates (list + upload more?)
pages.conditional: fishery products (IUU) only — lists uploaded certificates, exposes 'Add details' links and the 'Do you need to upload more catch certificates?' Yes/No radio (loops back to attach on Yes)

pages.name: Add catch certificate details (reference, issue date, flag state, species)
pages.conditional: fishery products (IUU) only — per-certificate detail form: catch-certificate reference, date of issue, flag state of catching vessel(s), select-all species. Repeated per certificate

evidence.note: fill 'Flag state of catching vessel(s)' (1st cert, mid of range)

pages.name: Latest health certificate (document reference, date, attachment)
pages.conditional: required after catch certificates on medium/high risk — trace mislabelled this 'Supporting documents (1st)'; workflow confirms it is the Latest Health Certificate page (document reference + date + Add attachment)

evidence.note: fill 'Month' of health-certificate date (mid of the page's fields; 70-72 are the attachment sub-page)

pages.name: Document upload (attachment sub-page)
pages.conditional: shown when adding a document attachment (reached via 'Add attachment' on the latest-health-certificate / accompanying-documents pages); shared upload page

pages.name: Accompanying documents (document type, reference, date)
pages.conditional: always — trace labelled 'Supporting documents (2nd)'; workflow confirms it is the Accompanying Documents page (document type dropdown = veterinary health certificate, reference, date)

evidence.note: fill 'Day' of document date (mid of range)

pages.name: Approved establishment of origin (landing)
pages.conditional: always — landing page with a 'Search for an approved establishment' button

evidence.note: click 'Search for an approved' establishment button

pages.name: Search for approved establishment (results + select)
pages.conditional: always — results table with a per-row 'Select' button

evidence.note: click 'Select' on first establishment row (84 is Save & continue, navigates away)

pages.name: Traders addresses (economic operators hub)
pages.conditional: hub for economic operators — exposes 'Add a consignor or exporter', 'Add a consignee', importer populate/'Same as consignee'; returned to across consignor/consignee/importer sub-flows

evidence.note: click 'Add a consignee' link (mid of the hub's visits)

pages.name: Search existing consignor / exporter
pages.conditional: shown when adding a consignor — 'Create a new consignor or exporter' vs selecting existing

evidence.note: click 'Create a new consignor or' link

pages.name: Consignor / exporter creation (address form)
pages.conditional: shown when creating a new consignor — full name/address/telephone/country/email form

evidence.note: fill 'City or town' (mid of address form)

pages.name: Consignor confirmation (add to notification)
pages.conditional: shown after creating a consignor — 'Add to notification' confirmation

pages.name: Search existing consignee
pages.conditional: shown when adding a consignee — 'Create a new consignee' vs selecting existing

pages.name: Consignee creation (address form)
pages.conditional: shown when creating a new consignee — full name/address/telephone/country/email form

evidence.note: fill 'City or town' (mid of address form)

pages.name: Consignee confirmation (add to notification)
pages.conditional: shown after creating a consignee — 'Add to notification' confirmation

pages.name: Transport details to BCP (port of entry + arrival leg)
pages.conditional: always — port of entry (Tilbury GBTIL), means of transport, transport identification, transport document reference, arrival date/time

pages.name: Means of transport after BCP (onward leg)
pages.conditional: shown when the consignment changes destination after BCP (answered Yes on origin-of-import) — onward transport means/identification/doc-ref/date-time

evidence.note: fill 'Month' of departure date (mid of range)

pages.name: Goods movement services (Common Transit / GVMS)
pages.conditional: always — 'Are you using the Common Transit Convention' (No) and 'Will the transport use the GVMS' (No) radios

evidence.note: check 'Will the transport use the' GVMS → No

pages.name: Transporter (landing / add)
pages.conditional: always — landing page with 'Add a transporter' link and final Save & continue

pages.name: Search existing transporter
pages.conditional: shown when adding a transporter — 'Create a new transporter' vs selecting existing

pages.name: Transporter creation (address form)
pages.conditional: shown when creating a new transporter — full name/address/telephone/country/email form

evidence.note: fill 'City or town' (mid of address form)

pages.name: Transporter confirmation (add to notification)
pages.conditional: shown after creating a transporter — 'Add to notification' confirmation

pages.name: Contact details
pages.conditional: always — trace collapsed into 'Intermediate save-and-continue steps'; workflow confirms contactDetails page (save & continue)

pages.name: Nominated contacts
pages.conditional: always — trace collapsed into 'Intermediate save-and-continue steps'; workflow confirms nominatedContacts page (save & continue)

pages.name: Contact address (place of destination / branch address landing)
pages.conditional: always — landing page exposing the 'add a new branch address' link

evidence.note: click 'add a new branch address' link

pages.name: Branch address creation (address form)
pages.conditional: shown when adding a new branch address — full name/address/telephone/country/email form

evidence.note: fill 'City or town' (mid of address form)

pages.name: Branch address confirmation (return to notification)
pages.conditional: shown after creating a branch address — 'Return to notification' confirmation

pages.name: Review notification (check your answers)
pages.conditional: always — check-your-answers summary; trace asserts the catch-certificate reference table renders both certificates

evidence.note: assert catch-certificate table contains 2nd reference (mid of the review asserts; 173 is Save & continue away)

pages.name: Declaration (submit notification)
pages.conditional: always — declaration checkboxes and the 'Submit notification' button

pages.name: Confirmation (reference number)
pages.conditional: post-submission — success page displaying the notification reference number (#reference-number); off the linear create path
